name: Claude Code
description: Installs Claude Code via the official native installer and makes the container a safe place to opt into --dangerously-skip-permissions: automatic non-interactive login (CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN respected, onboarding auto-completed), browser-login credentials persisted across rebuilds for the same project, and an always-on default-deny egress firewall. Experimental: expect breaking changes on the 0.x line.

version.description: Claude Code version to install: 'latest', 'stable', or an exact version such as 2.1.89. Passed to the native installer.

allowedDomains.description: Comma-separated extra domains to allow through the always-on egress firewall, e.g. for your project's own package registries or git hosts (pypi.org,files.pythonhosted.org,github.com,...).

autoOnboarding.description: On every container start, mark onboarding complete in the Claude config so CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN / API-key logins skip the interactive theme/setup screen. Does not change or set any permission mode.
